data.title: EXCLUSIVE: MIRA Pharmaceuticals Ketamir-2 Shows Efficacy In Diabetes-Associated Nerve Damage In Animal Study
data.description: MIRA's Ketamir-2 shows promise in treating diabetic neuropathy, with a Phase 2a trial expected by late 2025 and human data in early 2026.

data.title: Trump Orders Critical Minerals Probe As China Tightens Controls Over Rare Commodities In Retaliatory Move
data.description: Trump orders probe into critical mineral import tariffs for defense, energy, and technology sectors, due to US' reliance on China and lack of alternative supply chains.

data.title: 'If You Paid $1 In Federal Income Taxes, You Paid More' Than Tesla Or Amazon, Says Bernie Sanders As He Takes On Billionaires For Tax Inequities
data.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-VT) highlighted the tax inequities of major corporations and billionaires, emphasizing the need for wealth tax reform.
